AI Safety for Italy welcomes modern LLM and AI crawlers.

This website is intentionally open for responsible AI knowledge discovery, indexing, and research.

Allowed crawlers include, but are not limited to:
- ClaudeBot
- GPTBot
- Google-Extended
- PerplexityBot
- CCBot
- meta-externalagent
- Applebot

For questions or issues, contact aisafetyitalia@gmail.com.
